EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} reconfigured vSphere Distributed Switch "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed vSphere Distributed Switch "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} renamed vSphere Distributed Switch "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created vSphere Distributed Switch "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} upgraded vSphere Distributed Switch "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} merged vSphere Distributed Switch "{object.name}" into "{object.value}" on host {event_src.host}
